highlights.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
highlights.description: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

highlights.title: SpaceX Surge Further Boosts Saudi Billionaire Prince’s Fortune
highlights.description: Friday’s debut share surge for SpaceX is bolstering the fortunes of one of Saudi Arabia’s richest men.

highlights.title: Starmer to Meet Japan’s Takaichi as Fighter Jet Funding Sputters
highlights.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi on Sunday as uncertainty mounts over their joint fighter jet program with Italy because of doubts about the UK’s commitment.

highlights.title: EU sovereignty push gives tech buyers a new alphabet soup to swallow
highlights.description: Brussels presses on despite US fury as it looks to enforce cloud autonomy and bolster open source
